files.patch:
@@ -1,3 +1,4 @@
+<<<<<<< HEAD
 # Build outputs
 bin/
 *.exe
@@ -6,18 +7,33 @@ bin/
 *.so
 *.dylib
 
-# Go build cache
+# Test binaries
 *.test
+
+# Coverage / artifacts
 *.out
+coverage.*
+*.coverprofile
+profile.cov
+
+# Dependency dirs (uncomment to vendor)
+# vendor/
+
+# Go workspace
+go.work
+go.work.sum
+
+# Env
+.env
 
 # macOS
 .DS_Store
 
-# Editor
+# Editor/IDE
 .idea/
 .vscode/
 
-# Logs & state (runtime-generated)
+# Logs & runtime state
 *.log
 *.pid
 *.sock
